A cunning strike that disorients the enemy. Cancels the opponent's delayed attack,

Restores 5% to 35% of HP, depending on damage previously taken. The more wounded

Восстанавливает от 10% до 60% здоровья,:
Restores 10% to 60% of HP, depending on damage previously taken. The more wounded
Ulfhednar is, the more effective the healing.
Атаковать, игнорируя собственные раны. Д:
Attack while ignoring your own wounds. Grants from a small to 3x damage increase. The
more wounded Ulfhednar is, the more effective the attack.
Certain hit. Cannot miss or deal critical damage.
В течении хода прикрывать союзников свои: During the turn, covers allies with her body.
Вернутся и помочь союзнику, предоставив:
Return and help an ally, providing them a tactical opportunity. Distributes your current TP

Не задумываясь атаковать случайного враг:
Attack a random enemy without thinking and deal one and a half times more damage.

Выйти вперед и навязать врагу драку, при:
Step forward and force a fight, shielding allies and letting them act freely.
Distributes your current TP among allies and, during the turn, you take all enemy hits
onto yourself.

Take a deep breath, smile, and shake off the fear. For three turns, increases luck and

Отложенная атака, в следующем ходу нанес:
Delayed strike: on the next turn deals triple damage. While the rogue prepares to
strike, he is considered Hidden, and enemies cannot target him. If the strike from the
shadows proves fatal, the rogue gains 10TP.
Провести полноценную атаку, потратив тол:
Make a full attack while spending only half an action. If the target's Disoriented,
deal 1.5X damage.
Плут ненадолго выходит из боя, чтобы наб:
The rogue briefly steps out of battle to recover. He gains Hidden status for one turn,
and enemies cannot target him. Also, at the end of this turn and at the end of the
next turn, the rogue will receive 12TP each time (24TP total).
Провести обычную атаку, с некоторым шанс:
Perform a normal attack with a chance to blind the target for 1 turn.
A blinded target has -100% accuracy.
